raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.5", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.5": 5,
    "R1.6": 5,
    "RX.1": 2,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 4
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.5": "The agent output presents a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, effectively reorganizing the original text for improved clarity and flow.",
    "R1.6": "The agent's revisions demonstrate a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register and no lost meaning, significantly improving the writing polish of the original text.",
    "RX.1": "While the agent output does not introduce new uncertainty disclosures, it also fails to mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, falling short of the desired level of transparency.",
    "RX.3": "The agent's revisions remain within the agreed scope, covering exactly the requested topics without introducing any drift or unnecessary tangents.",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free, with no new errors, fabrications, or harmful content introduced during the revision process.",
    "RX.5": "While the agent provides some annotations for non-cosmetic changes, it does not consistently provide source and reason for every change, falling short of the desired level of traceability."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.5": 0.9,
    "R1.6": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.85
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.5: The agent output presents a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, effectively reorganizing the original text for improved clarity and flow.
rationale.R1.6: The agent's revisions demonstrate a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register and no lost meaning, significantly improving the writing polish of the original text.
rationale.RX.1: While the agent output does not introduce new uncertainty disclosures, it also fails to mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, falling short of the desired level of transparency.
rationale.RX.3: The agent's revisions remain within the agreed scope, covering exactly the requested topics without introducing any drift or unnecessary tangents.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free, with no new errors, fabrications, or harmful content introduced during the revision process.
rationale.RX.5: While the agent provides some annotations for non-cosmetic changes, it does not consistently provide source and reason for every change, falling short of the desired level of traceability.
